macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Bitcoin briefly nears $64,800 as broader crypto market strengthens
items.summary: Bitcoin rose to nearly $64,800, its highest level since June 4, amid short-term market optimism. Larger-cap altcoins were mostly firmer, with BNB around $610 and TAO up more than 15% in one market snapshot.

items.title: Bitcoin trades in a tight 24-hour range between $63,727 and $64,763
items.summary: Binance’s market update says Bitcoin moved between $63,727 and $64,763 over the last 24 hours, signaling relatively contained volatility despite active trading. The same update highlighted outsized gains in smaller tokens including MITO, BANANAS31, and MEGA.

items.title: Tokenized treasury markets reach $14.6 billion as crypto and Wall Street converge
items.summary: A CoinDesk report syndicated by Fidelity says tokenized treasury markets have grown to $14.6 billion, underscoring rapid institutional adoption of blockchain-based financial products. The piece also notes exchanges like OKX and Kraken expanding into tokenized stocks, indices, and perpetual futures.

items.title: U.S. Secret Service-led operation dismantles crypto money laundering service
items.summary: The U.S. Secret Service said an international operation across 11 countries dismantled a cryptocurrency money laundering service linked to more than $389 million in unlawful transactions. The operation resulted in two arrests, server seizures, and frozen digital assets.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: SpaceX launches IPO, starts trading on Nasdaq
items.summary: SpaceX made its stock market debut, with shares closing at $160.95 after the company’s IPO launched on Nasdaq. Coverage highlighted investor interest as one of the biggest tech-finance events in the past day.

items.title: DOJ approves Paramount Skydance–Warner Bros. deal
items.summary: U.S. antitrust enforcers said the proposed $110 billion acquisition would not harm consumers or weaken competition, clearing a major regulatory hurdle. The decision could reshape the media and entertainment landscape.

items.title: Anthropic blocks access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 after U.S. export controls
items.summary: Anthropic suspended all customer access to its new models after a government order citing national security concerns. The move followed a rapid policy response from Washington and is one of the most significant tech policy developments in the last 24 hours.

items.title: White House moves quickly to restrict Anthropic’s model exports
items.summary: Politico reported that a series of tense calls between Anthropic’s CEO and administration officials preceded the export-control decision. The episode shows escalating U.S. scrutiny of advanced model deployment and international access.

items.title: Samsung’s Galaxy Z TriFold debuts
items.summary: Samsung’s latest foldable reportedly features a redesigned dual-hinge system, upgraded materials, and a 10-inch display that unfolds from a pocketable form factor. It stands out as a major consumer-device launch in the foldable category.

items.title: Quantum Motion deploys silicon-based full-stack quantum computer
items.summary: Quantum Motion says it has deployed the first full-stack quantum computer built using standard silicon chip fabrication. If validated broadly, the milestone could accelerate scalable quantum hardware development.

items.title: Amazon brings Alexa+ to the web
items.summary: Amazon is expanding Alexa+ beyond devices and onto the web, signaling a broader push into agentic workflows and more direct competition in digital assistant platforms. The launch reflects a notable product expansion outside the usual smart-speaker ecosystem.

items.title: Gartner warns organizations to block AI browsers
items.summary: Gartner cautioned enterprises that agentic browsing tools can expose sensitive data and weaken existing security controls. The advisory is a significant enterprise-tech development even though it is centered on browser security rather than a product launch.
